CustomField.description: Please note: The data stored in this field is linked to the HomeKeeper National Data Hub. Do not change this field or hide it from the layout. Line 603. on the HUD-1. Enter negative amount if amount is owed from Seller.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Line 603. on the HUD-1. Enter negative amount if amount is owed from Seller.
CustomField.label: Net Cash to Seller at Closing
